summary: Provided a structured M7 visual, UX, localization, design-token, asset-slot, and debug/player-mode handoff for review before M7 UI implementation tasks.

tests_run.result: Art/visual thread returned the structured M7-VISUAL-UX-HANDOFF-001 Markdown content.

decisions.decision: Manual node battle UI remains rejected for 1.0 mainline unless a later Human Gate changes it.
Visual, localization, and player-mode UI quality work should be converted into M7 UI/localization tasks after systems and QA review.

risks.summary: Visual polish may hide required reason/cost data unless UI tasks preserve player-facing explanations and dev overlay separation.
Reason-code translation can drift from simulation semantics unless sim-core only emits stable reason codes/context and UI owns translation.
Portrait and icon choices may trigger cultural review or Human Gate if they imply unsupported historical, religious, or cultural claims.

requested_action: Review the handoff for architecture, scope, M7 content-lock compatibility, UI/read-model boundaries, i18n/sim-core separation, and whether it can safely drive downstream M7 UI/localization task graph updates before qa_reviewer review.
